title: BlockLight Craft Plugin
description: A plugin that adds a Light Block crafting recipe.
body:
# **EN**
### This plugin adds a crafting recipe for Light Blocks! When crafted, you receive 16 of them.

<details>
<summary>Recipe</summary>

![Recipe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d29600d925fbf3f8656be7a37bfae7398075809.png)


</details>

### You can customize:
- Amount
- Light level
- Recipe


# **RU**
### Этот плагин добавляет рецепт крафта Блоков Невидимого Света. В результате вы получаете 16 штук.

<details>
<summary>Рецепт</summary>

![Рецепт.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d29600d925fbf3f8656be7a37bfae7398075809.png)

</details>

### Вы можете настроить:
- Количество
- Уровень света
- Рецепт

## Default Config

```
# Crafting settings
recipe:
  shape:  # 3x3 shape (each line - 3 characters)
    - "ABC"
    - "DEF"
    - "GHI"

  ingredients:  # What each symbol represents
    A: BLAZE_ROD
    B: LANTERN
    C: GLOW_INK_SAC
    D: CANDLE
    E: GLASS_BOTTLE
    F: GLISTERING_MELON_SLICE
    G: SHROOMLIGHT
    H: SEA_LANTERN
    I: GLOW_BERRIES

  result:
    material: LIGHT  # Result item type
    amount: 16       # Quantity
    light-level: 15  # Light level (0-15)
```
